title: Transaction/document lock wrappers
primitives_added: AriadneStagedWriteTransaction (RAII staged-write txn; commit() or auto-abort=rollback)

build.note: build caught 2 real API errors first (AcTransactionManager->AcDbTransactionManager; AcDbHandle needs const ACHAR*); fixed -> clean. sizes unchanged vs T02 because wrappers are additive infra not yet called (type-checked+linked, dead-code-eliminated until C-F/G use them).

validate_bar.no_original_write: source-asserted: wrappers never save/saveAs; staged copy only
validate_bar.failure_rolls_back: RAII-by-construction: staged-write dtor abortTransaction() guarded by !mCommitted; source-asserted

next: MERGE-M08-INFRA (merge M08B-T01..T03 chain to main); then M08C-F READ family extends the dispatch table + uses these serializer/transaction primitives
